message.content:
@startuml
participant "User" as User
participant "GIT" as Git

participant "Working dir" as WorkingDir
participant "Stage" as Stage
participant "History" as History

User --> Git : create file2

Git --> WorkingDir : create file2

Git --> Stage : create file2

Git --> History : create file2

Git --> WorkingDir : git add file2

Git --> Stage : file2 created

Git --> History : file2 created

Git --> WorkingDir : git [reset | reset file2 | reset HEAD file2]

Git --> Stage : file2 created

Git --> WorkingDir : delete file2

@enduml
